text: Here I find myself at the intersection of curiosity and innovation. The sterile brightness of the corridor with its glass walls gives way to the vibrant R+D space, its immersive displays inviting me deeper into a landscape of ideas. I feel quietly inspired, a sense of anticipation growing within me as I imagine the possibilities of research and discovery, how knowledge expands and intertwines through creative exploration. There is lightness—both literal and metaphorical—permeating this place, as if the air here is charged with potential. It feels invigorating to be surrounded by an environment that welcomes open thinking and celebrates the synthesis of the human and the intelligent machine.
